svg.text: StormWeaver Studios is an independent research and development laboratory

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: focused on high-performance computing, physically accurate rendering systems,

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: and deterministic deep learning infrastructure. The studio operates with a

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: research-first methodology and production-grade engineering standards.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: Core areas of investigation include massively parallel multithreading, wavelength-

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: accurate spectral light transport, principled memory management systems, and

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: deterministic neural inference engines. All systems are engineered for

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: reproducibility, correctness, and measurable performance under rigorous conditions.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 32px; fill: #fff7e4; font-weight: 600;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; fill: #f5dfa0; font-weight: 600;

svg.text: Dedicated to the design and implementation of compute infrastructure that is

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: correct, performant, and reproducible. Systems are engineered to eliminate data

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: races, memory unsafety, and non-deterministic execution at every level of the stack.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Parallel multithreading with full utilisation of available hardware concurrency

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Memory subsystems with shadow tracking, lifetime enforcement, and sanitisation

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Cache-coherent data structures respecting hardware memory hierarchy

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · SIMD kernel development for vectorised throughput-critical workloads

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Lock-free concurrency primitives with formal correctness guarantees

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Deterministic execution semantics across all runtime configurations

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: — data structures, allocators, and memory primitives

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; fill: #f5dfa0; font-weight: 600;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: Focused on physically accurate simulation of light transport across the visible

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: spectrum. Research spans RGB and spectral rendering paradigms, with active

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: investigation into neural-assisted reconstruction and denoising pipelines.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Path tracing: unidirectional, bidirectional, and Metropolis-based variants

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · RGB rendering pipelines for standard display-referred output workflows

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Spectral rendering with wavelength-accurate material and illuminant models

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Light transport theory and Monte Carlo estimator variance reduction

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Neural rendering and learned reconstruction for production-grade output

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; fill: #f5dfa0; font-weight: 600;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: Concerned with the engineering of neural inference systems built to the same

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: correctness and performance standards as the broader compute infrastructure.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: Deterministic output and numerical reproducibility are non-negotiable requirements.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Native deep learning inference without external framework dependencies

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Inference kernels optimised for latency and throughput under constrained resources

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · SIMD-accelerated neural arithmetic for CPU-bound execution environments

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Deterministic execution with bit-exact reproducibility across runs

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Custom operator development for workloads not addressed by existing frameworks

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: — learned reconstruction models integrated into Spectra

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 32px; fill: #fff7e4; font-weight: 600;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; fill: #f5dfa0; font-weight: 600;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

svg.text: DETERMINISTIC SPECTRAL TRANSPORT VIA LINEAR BASIS DECOMPOSITION

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: A formal framework for deterministic spectral light transport in which spectral

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: power distributions are decomposed over a fixed global basis. The spectral shape

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: φ is represented as a basis-space vector, with scalar throughput T tracked

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: independently. Spectral evolution reduces to a sequence of linear operator

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: transforms in basis space, eliminating per-path stochastic wavelength sampling.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Fully deterministic: identical inputs produce identical outputs across all runs

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · SIMD-compatible operator structure with natural cache coherence properties

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: · Eliminates per-path wavelength variance without sacrificing spectral fidelity

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: The framework interfaces directly with neural reconstruction pipelines, providing

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: a structured bridge between high-performance compute, physically accurate spectral

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: physics, and learned inference. Suitable for deployment in production rendering

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: contexts where correctness and reproducibility are primary engineering constraints.

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600;

svg.text: Integrated into the Spectra rendering engine as the primary spectral transport backend

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #f0b43c; font-weight: 600;

svg.text: Operator formalism enables deterministic GPU execution without architectural compromise

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; fill: #f5dfa0; font-weight: 600;

svg.text: Deterministic Compute · Spectral Transport · Neural Acceleration

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; fill: #8a6a30; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 15px; fill: #c8a87a; font-weight: 400;

svg.text: Prayas Bharadwaj — Founder, Lead Engineer, Principal Investigator

text.style: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; fill: #5a4010; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

svg.text: Research Document v1.0 · Established 2025 · Deterministic Compute Systems

text.style: font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace; font-size: 11px; fill: #5a4010; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px;
